event.title: Fed funds rate after Apr 2027 meeting?

markets.rules_primary: If the upper bound of the target federal funds rate published on the Federal Reserve's official website is greater than 3.75% following the Federal Reserve's Apr 28, 2027 meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This market will expire the first 2:05 PM ET following the release of a Federal Reserve statement for their Apr 28, 2027 meeting or one week following the last day of that meeting.
markets.title: Will the upper bound of the federal funds rate be above 3.75% following the Fed's Apr 28, 2027 meeting?

markets.rules_primary: If the upper bound of the target federal funds rate published on the Federal Reserve's official website is greater than 4.00% following the Federal Reserve's Apr 28, 2027 meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This market will expire the first 2:05 PM ET following the release of a Federal Reserve statement for their Apr 28, 2027 meeting or one week following the last day of that meeting.
markets.title: Will the upper bound of the federal funds rate be above 4.00% following the Fed's Apr 28, 2027 meeting?

markets.rules_primary: If the upper bound of the target federal funds rate published on the Federal Reserve's official website is greater than 4.25% following the Federal Reserve's Apr 28, 2027 meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This market will expire the first 2:05 PM ET following the release of a Federal Reserve statement for their Apr 28, 2027 meeting or one week following the last day of that meeting.
markets.title: Will the upper bound of the federal funds rate be above 4.25% following the Fed's Apr 28, 2027 meeting?
